title: Anthropic Just Replaced Claude Code With New Claude Tag
summary: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, a team-focused version of Claude Code that integrates directly into Slack, connects to company tools, and enables task management in shared channels. It replaces the previous Claude Slack chatbot for enterprise team workflows.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's launch of Claude Tag, a team-focused version of Claude Code that integrates into Slack, connects to company tools, and supports task management in shared channels. It replaces the previous Claude Slack chatbot for enterprise team workflows. The shift matters because it moves Claude from individual coding assistance toward collaborative agent orchestration inside the channels where teams already work. The key takeaways: Tag operates in shared Slack channels, ties into company tooling, and is positioned for enterprise team collaboration rather than solo use.
